name: Hacker News — Show HN
post_rules: Title starts with 'Show HN:'. Put your URL in the URL field, leave text blank. Drop marketing language — factual and direct. First comment: backstory and what's different. Has to be something people can actually try, not a landing page or waitlist.
description: The technical launch bar. Huge audience but brutal — marketing tone gets flagged. HN doesn't publish user counts; audience left at 0 on purpose.
